generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values stability and duty, I worry about the growing calls to reduce our alliance commitments. While I understand the concerns about costs, we've seen what happens when we're not prepared - look at the 2023 Baltic incident where rapid response coordination saved lives. Our partners count on us, and walking away from that responsibility would send exactly the wrong signal to both allies and adversaries. We can't afford to be seen as unreliable when it comes to collective security. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
